title: Communauté de communes de Marquion
summary: The communauté de communes de Marquion  is a former intercommunality in the Pas-de-Calais département of the Nord-Pas-de-Calais region of northern France. It was created in January 2001. It was merged into the Communauté de communes Osartis Marquion in January 2014.
text:
The communauté de communes de Marquion  is a former intercommunality in the Pas-de-Calais département of the Nord-Pas-de-Calais region of northern France. It was created in January 2001. It was merged into the Communauté de communes Osartis Marquion in January 2014.

Participants
The communauté de communes comprised the following 17 communes:
